slices.title: Add CRUD actions to mobile navigation mockup
slices.jtbd: When using the mobile view, I want to access create, edit, and delete actions from the bottom navigation bar, so that I can perform core operations directly.
slices.acceptanceCriteria:
Given the design/approved/20260721003552-mockup/mockup.html file, When viewed in mobile layout, Then the bottom navigation bar includes visual elements for create, edit, and delete actions.
Given the updated navigation bar, When interacting with it, Then the search functionality remains prominent alongside the new actions.
slices.sixSigmaMetric: Decrease user interaction steps to access CRUD operations on mobile from 3 to 1
